hero.name: Sun Xiaoxiao
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer & Open Source Enthusiast
hero.description: Creating value with code, changing the world with technology
hero.subtitle: Exploring cutting-edge tech, sharing dev insights, building quality products
hero.bioMain: Build value with code. Change the world with tech.
hero.bioBody: Open source, indie products, the occasional essay. I believe small, sharp things go further than big, busy ones.
hero.bioDim: Fullstack engineer from Hangzhou — building things I'd actually want to use myself.

about.title: About Me
about.description: A tech-enthusiast developer who loves exploring new technologies and sharing interesting content
about.body: 10 years writing code. Day job by day, indie tools by night and weekend — usually small utilities and apps I throw up on GitHub.

beecount.name: BeeCount
beecount.subtitle: Finance Tracker
beecount.desc: Open-source finance tracker — iOS / Android / Web. iCloud + Supabase / WebDAV / S3 sync, AI-powered bookkeeping, OCR & voice input, 8+ languages.

beedns.name: BeeDNS
beedns.subtitle: DNS Manager
beedns.desc: Lightweight DNS record manager — one place for all your cloud providers. Supports Aliyun, Tencent Cloud, Cloudflare, and more.

desc.beecount: 🐝 OSS finance tracker · iCloud / Supabase / WebDAV / S3 sync · AI bookkeeping · iOS / Android / Web.
desc.panwatch: PanWatch — AI-powered stock monitor. A-share / HK / US stocks, multi-portfolio, intelligent agent analysis.
desc.xplayer: Cross-platform IPTV player — Android / iOS / macOS / Windows / TV / Linux in one codebase.
desc.lumina: Lumina — free & open-source data collaboration platform. Visualization + dashboards + teamwork.
desc.killport: 🔫 Cross-platform port killer — one command to free that stuck port.
